## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve, or what use case does it enable?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to happen.

## Affected Component

- [ ] `campaign/` (canonical contract)
- [ ] `crates/tools/` (CLI)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought about, and why this one is preferable.

## Additional Context

Links, references, or examples.
